Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert A. Imhoff is present. Representing by Barbara Armstrong.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ajai Nicole and Duncan Pound are present.
Attorney Steven Miyake representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Oct-15-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
